places.name: Shibuya Crossing
places.description: Stood at the world's busiest pedestrian crossing at rush hour. The sheer volume of people moving in perfect harmony was mesmerizing. Grabbed ramen at a tiny shop nearby and explored the 109 shopping complex.

places.name: Fushimi Inari Shrine
places.address: 68 Fukakusa Yabunouchicho, Fushimi Ward, Kyoto, Japan
places.description: Hiked the 4km trail through thousands of vermilion torii gates at dawn before the crowds arrived. The early morning mist made it feel like walking through another world. Reached the summit viewpoint overlooking Kyoto.

places.name: Dotonbori
places.description: Explored Osaka's neon-lit entertainment district along the canal. Ate takoyaki fresh off the griddle, tried okonomiyaki, and joined the crowds watching street performers under the famous Glico running man sign.

places.name: The Colosseum
places.address: Piazza del Colosseo, 1, 00184 Roma RM, Italy
places.description: Walked through 2000 years of history inside the iconic amphitheater. Imagined gladiatorial combat while standing on the arena floor. The scale of the structure is impossible to grasp from photos alone. Had an espresso at a bar across the street afterward.

places.name: Rialto Bridge & Grand Canal
places.description: Took a gondola ride through the narrow canals as the sun set behind the old palaces. The city feels like it's frozen in time. Discovered a tiny bacaro (wine bar) tucked in an alley serving cicchetti — Venice's answer to tapas.

places.name: Central Park
places.address: Central Park, New York, NY 10024, USA
places.description: Rented a rowboat on the lake and spent the morning drifting through the park as Manhattan's skyline towered around us. Visited the Bethesda Fountain, watched chess players in the village, and found the quietest bench in the Ramble.

places.name: Grand Canyon South Rim
places.description: Hiked down the Bright Angel Trail for 3 miles into the canyon. The layers of rock representing 2 billion years of Earth's history were humbling. Caught sunrise from Mather Point where the canyon turns gold and pink.
